mission_contract: Complete assigned work without human rescue — NOT SATISFIED
standing_principles: FAIL is feedback, not defeat. The objective is truth, not green status.
A verified FAIL advances the mission further than an unverified PASS.

three_states_do_not_conflate.this_bp_audit_mission: Exit criteria not yet satisfied (evidence gap)

blocker: No authoritative mechanical verdict yet — SENTRY_CHECK_RESULT.json missing
blocker_not: The verdict being FAIL (FAIL with evidence would be acceptable progress)
governance_wins: Attempt #5 blocked: invalid async, wrong mission-root paths, hallucinated probe IDs
